capability_contract.description: Operator-local fallback runner for gate and validation replay commands started through remote_exec.sh.
capability_contract.scratch_cleanup_guarantee: controller-local workspace state remains isolated beneath .local and may be cleared between runs

scratch_space.cleanup_guarantee: controller-local workspace state remains isolated beneath .local and may be cleared between runs

checks.description: Validate the current branch against its declared workstream ownership manifest and shared-surface contract.
Enforce the ADR 0163 through ADR 0168 agent handoff, ADR index, and workstream registration standards.
Verify that the generated ADR root manifest, facet shards, and reservation summary are current for documentation and workstream changes.
Run full-repository yamllint across tracked YAML files.

Validate canonical repository data models, provider-boundary anti-corruption guards, capability-contract catalogs, Atlas schema catalog contracts, the committed platform manifest artifact, operator roster schema, cross references, and receipt schemas.
docker_command: python scripts/provider_boundary_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/capability_contracts.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/data_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/operator_manager.py validate >/dev/null && python scripts/service_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/stage_smoke_suites.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/environment_topology.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/subdomain_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --validate >/dev/null && ./scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --export-mcp >/dev/null && python scripts/mutation_audit.py --validate-schema >/dev/null && ./scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh pyyaml -- scripts/atlas_schema.py validate >/dev/null

checks.description: Run Atlas pre-migration lint for the repo-managed SQL migration directories using the pinned Atlas image and an ephemeral PostgreSQL dev database.
Run the ADR 0230 shared OPA and Conftest policy checks against command approval, promotion eligibility, runner admission, and service-boundary invariants.
Regenerate SLO and HTTPS/TLS Prometheus rules and enforce severity plus runbook annotations on committed alert rules.
docker_command: python scripts/generate_slo_rules.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_https_tls_assurance.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/validate_alert_rules.py

checks.description: Reject reusable platform modules that import outward into scripts/ composition roots or dynamically load script-only helpers.
Regenerate the canonical generated documentation surfaces and fail if committed status docs drift.
Regenerate the portal build outputs and fail if committed publication artifacts drift.
Validate the service dependency graph schema, cross references, generated Mermaid markdown, and generated Excalidraw architecture scenes.
docker_command: python scripts/validate_dependency_graph.py >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check >/dev/null && python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check >/dev/null

checks.description: Scan published receipts and generated publication artifacts for secrets with the repo-managed gitleaks rules.
Syntax check every tracked playbook outside the shared playbook task includes.
Run the repo-managed ansible-lint policy against playbooks and the packaged collection.
Run the repo-managed Checkov IaC policy scan across the governed OpenTofu and Ansible surfaces and emit summary plus SARIF receipts.
Type check the gate orchestration code, Atlas schema helpers, and the manifest-backed Docker runner surfaces.
docker_command: ./scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh mypy pyyaml types-PyYAML httpx -- -m mypy --cache-dir /tmp/mypy-cache scripts/atlas_schema.py scripts/gate_bypass_waivers.py scripts/parallel_check.py scripts/run_gate.py scripts/gate_status.py scripts/iac_policy_scan.py scripts/log_gate_bypass.py scripts/policy_checks.py scripts/policy_toolchain.py scripts/semgrep_gate.py scripts/validation_lanes.py scripts/validation_runner_contracts.py config/windmill/scripts/atlas-drift-check.py config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py tests/test_atlas_schema.py tests/test_atlas_drift_check_windmill.py tests/test_iac_policy_scan.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_semgrep_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_lanes.py tests/test_policy_checks.py tests/test_command_catalog.py tests/test_validation_runner_contracts.py

checks.description: Enforce the ADR 0107 extension checklist for non-grandfathered services.
Validate all Packer templates when the repo carries them; otherwise report a no-op pass.
Validate OpenTofu configuration if the repo carries a tofu root; otherwise report a no-op pass.
docker_command: if [ -d tofu ]; then tofu -chdir=tofu validate; else echo 'No tofu configuration present'; fi

checks.description: Run the repository filesystem through the pinned Trivy security scan policy.
docker_command: trivy fs --timeout 15m --scanners misconfig,secret --skip-db-update --skip-dirs .ansible --skip-dirs .git --skip-dirs .worktrees --skip-files docker/check-runners/ansible/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/infra/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/python/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/security/Dockerfile --skip-files uv.lock --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL .

checks.description: Run the repo-managed Semgrep SAST, secret-pattern, and Dockerfile policy scan and write the SARIF receipt.
Run the ADR 0111 non-destructive integration suite against staging if active, or record a repo-managed skip if no integration target is currently available.

lane_results.title: Documentation and ADR lane
lane_results.description: Validate ADR metadata, runbooks, and workstream notes without widening into unrelated generated-asset sweeps.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Documentation and ADR lane passed on the full-lane replay via documentation-index.

lane_results.title: Repository structure and schema lane
lane_results.description: Validate repository catalogs, data models, cross-surface policy contracts, and alert-rule generation.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Repository structure and schema lane passed on the full-lane replay via yaml-lint, schema-validation, atlas-lint, policy-validation, alert-rule-validation, dependency-direction.

lane_results.title: Generated artifact and canonical-truth lane
lane_results.description: Validate generated portals, dependency diagrams, and publication-safe artifact surfaces.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Generated artifact and canonical-truth lane passed on the full-lane replay via generated-docs, generated-portals, dependency-graph, artifact-secret-scan.

lane_results.title: Service-specific syntax and unit lane
lane_results.description: Validate service automation syntax, lint, typed orchestration helpers, and service completeness contracts.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Service-specific syntax and unit lane passed on the full-lane replay via ansible-syntax, ansible-lint, iac-policy-scan, type-check, service-completeness.

lane_results.title: Remote builder lane
lane_results.description: Validate build-runner images, infrastructure roots, and heavyweight scanner surfaces.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Remote builder lane passed on the full-lane replay via packer-validate, tofu-validate, security-scan, semgrep-sast, iac-policy-scan.

lane_results.title: Live-apply and promotion lane
lane_results.description: Validate promotion-facing runtime verification and post-merge automation entrypoints.
lane_results.green_path_summary: Live-apply and promotion lane passed on the full-lane replay via integration-tests.

fast_global_results.description: Validate the current branch against its declared workstream ownership manifest and shared-surface contract.
Enforce the ADR 0163 through ADR 0168 agent handoff, ADR index, and workstream registration standards.
